design_strategy.core_philosophy: Ultra-Minimalism. Subtractive Design. Typography as Architecture.
design_strategy.target_audience: C-suite executives, Global Enterprises, High-net-worth individuals

rules: Never use bold weights for display text; rely on size for hierarchy.
Use 'Inter' with 'font-feature-settings': 'cv11', 'ss01' for a more Swiss/technical look if possible.

usage.cta_secondary: bg-transparent border border-neutral-200 text-black hover:border-black transition-colors duration-300

layout_grid.bento_strategy: Mode A (The Tetris Grid) - Focusing on asymmetry and negative space.
rules: Use massive negative space. Allow text to breathe.
Avoid centering text unless absolutely necessary for a specific 'editorial' moment.
Align content to the left grid lines.
Use 12-column grid for desktop, 1-column for mobile.

buttons.primary: h-12 px-8 rounded-none text-sm font-medium tracking-widest uppercase bg-[#D4AF37] text-white hover:bg-[#C5A028]
buttons.secondary: h-12 px-8 rounded-none text-sm font-medium tracking-widest uppercase border border-neutral-200 hover:border-black bg-transparent text-black

cards.style: No visible cards (borderless). Content floats in negative space.
cards.hover: No elevation/shadow. Subtle opacity shift or text color change on hover.

inputs.style: bg-transparent border-b border-neutral-300 rounded-none px-0 py-4 focus:border-black focus:ring-0 placeholder:text-neutral-300 transition-colors

navigation.style: Fixed top, transparent backdrop with blur. Logo left, Links right.
navigation.links: text-sm font-medium tracking-widest uppercase hover:text-[#D4AF37] transition-colors

visual_enhancers.hero_overlay: Use a white gradient overlay on image_1.png: 'bg-gradient-to-t from-white via-white/50 to-transparent' to seamlessly blend it into the white background.
visual_enhancers.texture: Clean. No grain. No noise. Pure vector precision.
visual_enhancers.decoration: Use single 1px lines (dividers) sparingly to create structure without weight.

hero_bg.treatment: Blend with white gradient overlay. Positioned right or center-aligned with heavy opacity fade.

architectural_accents.description: Use for 'Companies' or 'Careers' background if needed (very low opacity)

home.hero: Headline: 'STRATEGIC. GOVERNANCE. LEGACY.' Subtext: 'Advisory for the world's most demanding leaders.' CTA: 'Inquire Now'

companies.layout: 3-column text grid. Headings: 'Governance', 'Risk', 'Strategy'. Content: Bullet points with custom gold markers.

careers.layout: 3-column text grid. Focus on 'Mentorship', 'Growth', 'Placement'. Subtle architectural background.

about.layout: Split screen (Text Left, Image Right - blended). Bio text in 'body_large'.

contact.layout: Minimalist form left, Calendly embed right. 'Let's shape the future.' headline.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. IMPLEMENTATION: Use 'Inter' font family. Ensure `tailwind.config.js` extends font family.
2. IMAGES: Use the provided `hero_bg` image for Home and About. Apply `mix-blend-multiply` or opacity fade to ensure text readability.
3. SPACING: Do not be afraid of empty space. If it feels empty, add more padding, not more content.
4. COMPONENTS: Do not use Cards. Use simple `div`s with padding. Use lines (`border-t`) to separate content sections instead of boxes.
5. GOLD ACCENT: Use #D4AF37 strictly for Buttons and maybe 1-2 key lines/underlines. Never for body text.
6. CALENDLY: Use `react-calendly` or simple iframe for the embed.
7. DATA-TESTID: Add `data-testid` to all interactive elements.
universal_guidelines: You tend to converge toward generic outputs. Avoid this.
Don't make generic centered layouts. Use asymmetric grids.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Subtle textures and noise overlays separate good from extraordinary.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable.
